revision.comment: Sync from repo need_translation/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24615006798|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:蛭子神社 (那賀町)]] {{Expand Japanese|蛭子神社 (那賀町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693) | native_name = 蛭子神社 | image = Hiruko-jinja.jpeg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693) | coordinates = {{coord|33.86002777777778|134.5021111111111}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hiruko Shrine'''|蛭子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183216 * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183216 ** Series ordinal: 2675 == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514}} ** Series ordinal: 42 ** P155: {{ill|Unawino Shrine|lt=Unawino Shrine|qid=Q135041372}} ** P156: {{ill|Murohimeno Shrine|lt=Murohimeno Shrine|qid=Q135041374}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Naka, Tokushima|lt=Naka|arz|ناكا|ceb|Naka Chō|en|Naka, Tokushima|es|Naka (Tokushima)|fa|ناکا، توکوشیما|fr|Naka (Tokushima)|id|Naka, Tokushima|it|Naka (Tokushima)|ja|那賀町|ko|나카정|ms|Naka, Tokushima|my|နခမြို့၊ တိုခုရှီးမား|pl|Naka (Tokushima)|ro|Naka, Tokushima|ru|Нака (посёлок)|tl|Naka, Tokushima|tr|Naka, Tokushima|uk|Нака (Токусіма)|zh|那賀町|qid=Q1205685}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457}} * {{ill|Naka District, Tokushima|lt=Naka district|ceb|Naka Gun|en|Naka District, Tokushima|es|Distrito de Naka|fr|District de Naka (Tokushima)|id|Distrik Naka, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Naka (Tokushima)|ja|那賀郡|ko|나카군 (도쿠시마현)|pl|Powiat Naka (Tokushima)|uk|Повіт Нака (Токусіма)|zh|那賀郡|qid=Q1156492}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.86002777777778|134.5021111111111}} == image (P18) == * Hiruko-jinja.jpeg == OpenCorporates ID (P1320) == * jp/4480005004531 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183216 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4480005004531 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Wanasaifusono Shrine|lt=Wanasaifusono Shrine|qid=Q135041373}} ==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[JA:蛭子神社 (那賀町)]] {{wikidata link|Q106852693}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|蛭子神社 (那賀町)|version=107352853|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Need translation]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 蛭子神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Hiruko-jinja.jpeg|250px]] |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|那賀郡|Q1156492}}{{jalink|那賀町|Q1205685}}和食字町154 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|蛭子大神}}
{{jalink|天照皇大神}}
{{jalink|素盞嗚神}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}}・{{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=蛭子神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[ファイル:Fufusugi.jpeg|thumb|夫婦杉]] [[File:Hiruko shrine 20231031 1.jpg|thumb|本殿拝殿]] '''蛭子神社'''（ひるこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|那賀町|Q1205685}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|鷲敷七福神}}（{{jalink|えびす|Q1129330|恵比寿大神}}）のひとつ。 == 歴史 == 創建は不詳。{{jalink|823年|Q29944}}（{{jalink|天長|Q1373138}}2年）、{{jalink|空海|Q222227}}が遷宮。{{jalink|1505年|Q6153}}（{{jalink|永正|Q1193577}}2年）、管領職を勤めた{{jalink|細川澄元|Q4390574}}が流鏑馬を奉納。その後、{{jalink|1601年|Q6725}}（{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}6年）に造営{{Cite web|和書|url=http://engishiki.org/awa2/bun/awh560703-04.html|title=蛭子神社旧地|publisher=延喜式神社の調査|accessdate=2021-05-11}}。 夫婦杉と呼ばれて親しまれている樹齢1000年の2本の{{jalink|杉}}の巨木をはじめ、{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722|オオクス}}や{{jalink|イヌマキ|Q165063}}などの老樹が聳えている。蛭子神社内には徳島県指定の天然記念物である{{jalink|ボウラン|Q10911571}}が自生しており、5月に見ごろを迎える{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.jalan.net/kankou/spt_36368ag2132025517/|title=蛭子神社|publisher=じゃらん|accessdate=2021-05-11}}。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|蛭子大神}} * {{jalink|天照皇大神}} * {{jalink|素盞嗚神}} == 交通 == * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}「{{jalink|徳島駅|Q860775}}」より車で約80分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.town.tokushima-naka.lg.jp/gyosei/docs/3615.html 蛭子神社] - 那賀町 * [https://www.jalan.net/kankou/spt_36368ag2132025517/ 蛭子神社] - じゃらん {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:那賀町の建築物]] [[Category:那賀町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Need translation]]
